reviews.title: Misleading breakfast package and poor service
reviews.text:
Very disappointing stay. The bed linen had visible stains, which is unacceptable. Staff were unhelpful, when I requested a room facing the Sphere, I was repeatedly told to check again the next day without anyone properly checking availability. The fridge door could not close tightly.

Most frustrating was the breakfast. I booked a room with breakfast, only to later find out there is a credit cap per room, which was never clearly explained. Menu prices are very high, so we ended up paying much more out of pocket. This felt misleading.
reviews.room_type: Two Double Beds, Guest room, 2 Double

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Any payment from my card 3 times 
$20
$20
$1.84

reviews.title: Overall below Renaissance standards
reviews.text:
The lobby and swimming pool area sounds normal as other Renaissance hotels, however when I got in to my room..., I was a little bit surprised. The room not just looked old-fashioned but needed to repair.
We checked-in two rooms by two different server, sorry I forgot their names, the man who helped me really helpful but the other lady who take care with my friends was so rude. She was my server when I checked-out, again same old manner, 'impolite' to us.
Talk about breakfast, the server wasn't attentive, and the buffet area didn't have food for quite some time, although that is just 8am.
The good thing was that they offered you wine-tasting and afternoon tea at the lobby lounge and $20 cash couple at Watergate Casino.
reviews.room_type: Strip View Room, King Bed, Guest room, 1 King, Las Vegas Strip view

reviews.title: Dont book this hotel
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives:
I found insect in my room
Sheets is dirty
The wall is thin and you can hear others rooms 
The reception staff are so ignorant they keep withdrew from the credit card although they already take all stay cost at once at check in.

reviews.title: So
reviews.text: I waited almost 1 hour for check-in. Dont expect good breakfast as well...
reviews.room_type: Strip View Room, King Bed, Guest room, 1 King, Las Vegas Strip view

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: More respectfull staff

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.room_type: Strip View, 2 Double Beds, Guest room, 2 Double, Las Vegas Strip view

reviews.title: The hotel was nice but they are many many many things that need to be made better!
reviews.positives: I liked the hotel staff when checking in and the free vouchers.
reviews.negatives: There were many issues with the room and the breakfast. When I checked in and went to the room there was a massive wet spot on the bed under the covers despite the staff saying that the room had just been serviced by housekeeping. Upon coming back to the hotel for my final night’s stay there was a very disgusting smell emanating from the bathroom. The breakfast breakdown was a bit confusing and should be detailed in the booking. Parking should also be included. As well as free wifi without signing up for something.

reviews.title: Two times he deducted money in my account
reviews.text:
I paid in agoda
But in reception deducted money 
Two times in my credit card
Pls clear

reviews.title: Not a good experience
reviews.negatives:
The aer conditioning broke and smelled like burning in the room. Did not have any other room to give us ,so we ended up staying in the same room all night and didn't sleep well. We waited 2 hours to figure out what was going on. They promised a 50% discount for the night, which didn't happen. The next day, we waited half of the day to have a new room ready for us. 
Also, they have full elevators, and only one was working on the first day when we got there
Our vacation was wasted on waiting to have things fixed. 
I expected better things from Renaissance.

reviews.title: Ala carte Breakfast
reviews.text:
Ala carte breakfast & has credit limit. 
Both staff at the reception & restaurant didn't tell us about the limit. So we must pay for extra & the gratuity.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Being checked in was pleasant
reviews.negatives: The power was out the morning of my stay, and was charged an unbelievable fee of $500 for smoking which I am not, otherwise why would I ask for a Non smoking. Also the service to get a hold of someone had to take 4 calls to get help

reviews.title: Hotel is nice
reviews.text: Hotel is nice and clean. Not along the main strip, but near the mono rail for easier trip going to main strip.
reviews.room_type: Two Double Beds, Guest room, 2 Double

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.negatives: This is one of the worst hotels i have been ever, they playing with card payments, every day they take money from the card and we make many complaints about it, until i was in my country they try to take more money and i was contacted them and customer service and the are no reply..

reviews.title: Nice Business hotel next to the main strip
reviews.text: The hotel is nice but they usually cater airline staff more so a lot of service are missing. If you are doing the business near the strip or want a hideaway from craziness and just sleep, this is the hotel you would go for

reviews.title: disappointed
reviews.negatives: Bar food and restaurant food was below average

reviews.title: Nice stay!
reviews.text:
The hotel's nice and cozy. I would recommend for everyone.  The room not too big. But it's clean. U have fridge and coffee maker. 
But the bed is small.
Nice breakfast and bar. Close to strip.

reviews.title: Disappointing won’t book thru Booking or this hotel again
reviews.positives: Breakfast and service was grat
reviews.negatives: Booked a king suite, upon check in was told that not only would the room be later than promised but “they didn’t have to follow 3rd party contract” and gave us a double queen room.  Very rude check in staff

reviews.title: Clean room with great in-room amenities
reviews.text: Clean room with great in-room amenities but location is a distance from the main strip. Good for travelers whom prefer tranquility away from the main entertainment strip.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: location
reviews.negatives: price, toilet ran, outlet in bathroom didn’t work

reviews.title: Nice location off the strip, you get what you pay for.
reviews.positives: I liked that it was off the strip and quiet, no casino and a pool.  The staff was helpful and the lobby was clean.
reviews.negatives: The faucet in the bathroom did not work, the water pressure was low, and the walls were so thin without insulation I could hear a person in the room next door snoring.

reviews.title: Amazing Hotel with Actual Hospitality
reviews.text: One of the best no-frills hotel in Vegas. The location is superb and close to mono rail. Staff is courteous and very accommodating. Would highly recommend.
reviews.room_type: Two Double Beds, Guest room, 2 Double

reviews.title: Best stay ever!
reviews.text: Very friendly staff! Clean and easy acces from parking to hotel room.

reviews.title: except the breakfast, other is fine
reviews.positives: the location and the room cleanliness,
reviews.negatives: the informaiton of the booking, it showed the price including the breakfast, but when I went to the restaurnant, the server told me that we just can pick the meal under 50 dollars, this information i can't find it when I booked, so if I know this situation I will not book this hotel, so please describe it clearly.

reviews.title: Great convenient location
reviews.text: Excellent facilities, clean tidy and modern. Convenient location right next door to the convention center and the monorail for easy access to the strip.
reviews.room_type: Two Double Beds, Guest room, 2 Double

reviews.title: Above average

reviews.negatives:
Breakfast: long wait, understaffed and poor menu choice. 
Only remark about the room: no lights switches next to bed.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 라스베가스 여러호텔들의 직원들중에서도 상당히 친절하고 매너가 좋아요~ 카지노가 없어서 호텔전체 분위기가 차쾌적해서 개인적으로 맘에 들었어요.침구와 룸상태도 좋고 아베다브랜드 샤워용품 맘에 들었어요

reviews.title: Overall, I enjoyed my stay. The pooh smell, drains, and light bulbs in 612 need to be addressed.
reviews.positives: The staff was wonderful, polite and accommodating. The breakfast was wonderful!! Food however way expensive almost $50 for a single porkchop
reviews.negatives: My room smelled funky from the first day, got move on the last night after I mentioned it to management and was compt $100 credit for dinner but my room got charged $114 for a porkchop, brusseel sprouts and a meat n chease board and I paid for the meal that I wouldn't have ordered in the first place. Breakfast was excellent. Over all, the hotel felt outdated and in need of work throughout. With the overall cost, wifi should be included.

reviews.title: 住宿二天沒有整理房間
reviews.text: 連續住宿二晚，都沒有來整理房間也沒有更換或補充浴巾！

reviews.negatives: Pool was closed. Unnecessarily complicated charging of my credit card. Restaurant ridiculously expensive. Coffee maker in room uses too much plastic.

reviews.negatives: Grill 55 was mediocre at best. Pool area doesn't have enough lounge chairs. Some of the "free" perks like the free mini dessert were unavailable during the hours they said they were available.

reviews.title: I appreciated being close to the airport, as I had to leave on a late flight.
reviews.positives: I liked the cleanliness and the helpfulness of the staff.
reviews.negatives: I needed to eat breakfast at 5:30am, and the dining room wasn't open.

reviews.title: Perfect for what I wanted
reviews.positives:
Loved that it was t a casino 
really nice personnel 
Liked gym but could do some greenery on roof
reviews.negatives:
It’s a bit outdated 
Room w/ garage view

reviews.title: Nice place and location
reviews.positives:
The bathroom was spacious and clean.
The bed was comfortable.
reviews.negatives: none

reviews.title: EAGLES Las Vegas
reviews.positives:
The location is great. We used the monorail to get to the Vegas strip which is right next door to the Renaissance at the Convention Center. Super easy! Also an easy walk to the SPHERE which is the reason we were in  Vegas  to see the Eagles. 
We arrive at the hotel early because we had an early morning flight. The Renaissance was able to store our luggage for us until check in at 3pm. Great service to offer to guest and super friendly staff with a smile. 
The room was clean bed and pillows comfortable and water was hot! 
There is a Starbucks on site and an Italian restaurant. We did get coffee and breakfast at Starbucks but didn’t have the chance to eat at Zoi’s the Italian restaurant.
reviews.negatives: The front desk staff was going to text us when our room was available but never did. And the water pressure in the shower was slow. Which are minor issues. We enjoyed our stay and would stay at Renaissance LasVegas again!

reviews.title: Perfect if you are going to the convention center.
reviews.positives: Staff were very helpful. Room was a decent size. Very close to where I needed to be for work every morning.
reviews.negatives: The elevators broke on several occasions. This would be fine if there were easily accessible stairs.

reviews.title: Beautiful, clean and kind personnel
reviews.positives: It was a very nice hotel. Everyone was very kind. When asked for certain accommodations, they were taken care of right away. We even received a follow up phone call to make sure our needs had been met.
reviews.negatives: We had 2 handicapped people in a wheelchair. I was hoping for a walk in shower without the tub. The non slip on the tub was old and unfortunately did not have a good grip, My Dad ended up slipping and falling while in the shower.

reviews.title: It was a great stay , very comfortable and big room
reviews.positives: Close to everything and no casino so really chill lobby and easy to catch an uber
reviews.negatives: A little pricey

reviews.title: Room With Great Strip View and Reasonable Value
reviews.positives: No casino so was quiet and didn't smell of smoke.  Room was cleaned and serviced daily. Right next to the Convention Center and had its own Monorail station to move along the strip quickly.  We had a strip view room which could see all the bright lights, sphere, and high roller at night.  Room came with a refrigerator.
reviews.negatives: Room was cleaned every day but it was just late in the day.  No gift shop or shop for quick snacks and drinks.  Their cafe/Starbucks closes at 2pm.  Room, resort fees, and taxes were all paid for 2 days prior by Booking.com and still had my credit card charged half the amount by the hotel because Booking hadn't presented the payment to the hotel, so didn't care for that extra charge to be credited back after the stay.  Room did not have a microwave after requesting one.

reviews.title: Was nice area to stay at especially that it was across the street from Cowboy Christmas!
reviews.positives: Room was clean bed comfy. Bar area was great & great service. Check in staff were very nice when we checked in. When we checked out the man who helped me was very very kind & nice.
reviews.negatives: We asked a front area employee (a Women) if we could use a luggage cart when we arrived, she was not very nice to us. Also the outside man that was doing the valet parking was also not very nice to us. We didn't do valet parking, we parked our own vehicle.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The rooms were cozy. The beds were comfortable after several hours of travel and full days out. The AC was especially good after returning, and the bathroom and shower was pretty good. The TV was of good quality and I liked that I could order food through something like Uber Eats and have it delivered to the reception area. I still chose to ask reception to see if that was ok before doing so.
reviews.negatives: The pillows were a little flat, so I would stack two pillows to sleep. That wasn't too much of an issue, and I get that some people prefer less firm pillows. While the shower was nice, it was leaking water out along the base where the glass pane meets the tile. I think it was just the caulking having worn away there.

reviews.title: Nice location and decently comfortable.
reviews.positives: Nice and quiet, a little off the strip but close to the monorail station making it easily accessible to the strip! Room was decently comfortable. I loved that there was a shower AND separate tub to do soaks. Staff was very friendly.
reviews.negatives: My toilet’s flush pressure was poor and the soap holders in the shower was connected to the wall with adhesive. It came crashing off the wall randomly in the middle of the night waking me up.

reviews.title: Fantastic if you're going to the convention center
reviews.positives: Every single staff member we encountered was incredibly helpful and friendly
reviews.negatives: The tv didnt work, the elevators took forever since 2 of the 4 were out of service, the room service food was great.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: It was clean, nice staff, close to metro, away from the crowds.
reviews.negatives: Expensive restaurant.  Would like more food options.

reviews.title: I liked being off the strip
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Expensive parking fees

reviews.title: Great location and staff
reviews.positives: Location, staff were amazing, well cared for lobby and bar, clean. No casino, smoke or crowds.  The monorail came right to a stop out front so you could go up the strip if you wanted to.
reviews.negatives: Hallways and rooms showed some wear and tear that could be easily addressed.  Warm water took forever to get to the rooms far from the elevators.  On site restaurant looked good but was very expensive and the only real food on the property with little within walking distance.

reviews.title: Excellent stay at the Renaissance for Magic Con Las Vegas 2024!
reviews.positives: I've stayed in many hotels. The Renaissance in Las Vegas is a really great one -- very clean, very professional staff. I would certainly stay there again when I return to Las Vegas.
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.negatives: stated above, over all the staff did an excellent job.

reviews.title: Will stay here again for a convention.
reviews.positives: Breakfast was great. Check in and check out was smooth. Staff was attentive and courteous.
reviews.negatives: Room was clean but could be cleaner. In room safe was not working.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Would absolutely recommend this hotel to anyone
reviews.positives: Room was clean, and inviting. We Felt welcome.
reviews.negatives: The shower was clogged so the water doesn’t drain while showering.

reviews.title: Relaxed, comfortable, clean and much more.

reviews.negatives: nothing! Everything was perfect

reviews.title: Legendary service
reviews.positives: Location and amenities
reviews.negatives: Everything was perfect so had nothing bad to say

reviews.title: great stay and the breakfast was fantastic along with staff
reviews.positives: breakfast, staff and lounge area
reviews.negatives: location is great if you do not plan on hanging out on the strip.

reviews.title: This will be my Vegas hotel for every trip going forward for leisure and business trips.
reviews.positives: Newly renovated. Onsite Zios Italian restaurant was great and convenient. The wait staff were all wonderful. Valet was on point. Close to convention south hall and the monorail. Close enough to strip to enjoy without strip lodging prices. Definitely would suggest and I will visit again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: All of it

reviews.title: Clean, close, convenient, and perks
reviews.positives: Clean, close to convention center, walking distance to the strip.
reviews.negatives: Charged for parking.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Location - super close to everything, but not on Strip so you don’t have all the crazy traffic. Also conveniently located right next to the convention center

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great location! Great breakfast! Perfect place to stay at the festival that’s close to the grounds but gets you away from the chaos.
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: Excellent hotel at Las Vegas
reviews.positives: excellent hotel, well located and good buffet breakfast
reviews.negatives: nothing

reviews.title: When we come back to Las Vegas we will definitely return to this hotel
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Very peaceful and comfortable

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Loved the property. Hated booking.com’s cancellation policy and the inability to speak with a service representative. I will never use Booking.com again.
reviews.negatives: Everything. But I needed to cancel and had to go so as not to lose my money.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: The breakfast was excellent  delicious and the location very convenient.
reviews.negatives: I arrived early and I checked in at 15:00 and my room was not ready, I wait for 40 min and still not ready, I have to take another room without a street view because my 83 years old mother needs to rest after a long trip, it was very disappointed do not have the room ready when the guess arrived.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The food was served Luke warm.  We had to ask for it to be reheated

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.negatives: I thought I was getting a spa tub and just got a regular one

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Staff very friendly and helpful
reviews.negatives: We have to pay for breakfast

reviews.title: Staff is amazing and lovely! Would stay again!!
reviews.positives: Easy access to the monorail and very close to the convention center

reviews.title: Definitely recommend!
reviews.positives:
Beautiful hotel, pool and room! Self parking option is easy to come and go as we pleased 
We got a great deal from booking.com 
There was a cute little robot making room deliveries. 
10 out of 10
reviews.negatives: N/a

reviews.title: great location if you are attending an event at the convention center!
reviews.positives: friendly staff, earlier check in was great.
reviews.negatives: drinks at bar were a bit too pricy for me.

reviews.title: Hotel Bonito, en medio de la nada a precio desorbitado.
reviews.positives: El sitio es bonito y tiene bar
reviews.negatives: Te cobran por todo, como un Fee de 30 dolares obligatorio para que te puedas tomar una cerveza o te inviten a un postre. El desayuno no esta incluido, te dan 25 dolares de credito, si te pasas, pues tienes que pagar impuestos. Hay muchas mejores opciones y puedes encontrar alojamiento por la tercera parte del costo. Una noche una habitación doble normal $350 usd. Desproporcionado, por el mismo precio vas al Venecian.

reviews.title: Un hotel bueno, bien situado, al que le falta un buen servicio y una mejor oferta de desayuno y cafetería.
reviews.positives: La localización. Apartado del strip pero perfectamente comunicado por monorail.
reviews.negatives:
La piscina estaba en una suerte de patio medio cerrado.
El desayuno era realmente pobre, parece ser que a los que lo llevan incluido los envían a una sala para los members club que está mal servida y peor atendida. Luego nos enteramos que había otro salón para el desayuno, que supuestamente debía ser el nuestro.
El pequeño restaurante, había otro que no probamos, del lobby tenía una oferta muy corta y le faltaban platos habitualmente.
En otro orden de cosas, cargan extras en la cuenta que no te saben explicar y como no estés atento te puedes llevar una sorpresa.

reviews.title: Una noche en las vegas.
reviews.positives: La zona del hotel es bastante tranquila y el personal es muy amable y atento, hablan varios idiomas, lo que facilito la comunicación. El acceso a las zonas comunes fue bastante sencillo.
reviews.negatives: El aire acondicionado falló toda la noche, aunque trataron de solucionarlo no fue posible y no nos brindaron cambio de habitación. Las alfombras de la habitación necesitaban un poco más de limpieza y aunque tomamos habitación para 4 adultos solo ofrecieron desayuno para 2.

reviews.title: Ideal para una viaje de negocios y alojarse cerca del centro de convenciones de Las Vegas.
reviews.positives: Muy buena la ubicación del hotel
reviews.negatives: Lo que no me gusto fue que mi reserva booking no estaba en el sistema del hotel, fue una larga espera para tener certeza si podían darme una habitación ya que me dijeron que no había disponibilidad, al final por la gentileza y amabilidad del encargado (yousef) me dieron una solución pero tuve que pagar el alojamiento como si yo hubiese ido sin reserva.

reviews.title: Gran lugar para estar en las vegas
reviews.positives: Las habitaciones son muy limpias

reviews.title: Bueno Bonito Barato
reviews.positives: Starbucks en el hotel
reviews.negatives: Ruidos en los pasillos en la noche, olor del cuarto.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Buenas instalaciones
reviews.negatives: No habia wifi gratis

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Excelente, si quieres estar en un hotel un poco alejado del centro y de los casinos.
reviews.negatives: Nada, todo muy bien. Salvo que quieras estar cerca del centro

reviews.title: Agradable. Confortable.  Trabajo y ocio.
reviews.positives: La vista, la ubicación.  Habitaciones cómodas y el servicio al cliente muy bueno.
reviews.negatives: Sin novedad.

reviews.title: Espectacular alojamiento en Las Vegas. 100% recomendable.
reviews.positives: El desayuno y el sistema que tienen. 50 dolares diarios para ocuparlos en desayuno, incluidos en el pago de la habitación.
reviews.negatives: No hay nada que no me haya gustado.

reviews.title: Excelente
reviews.positives: Ubicación y Limpieza
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Hotel calme proche du strip
reviews.positives: Grande chambre dans un hôtel calme sans casino, proche du strip (voiture nécessaire). Parking payant mais raisonnable. Prix modeste pour Las Vegas.
reviews.negatives: Le wifi est payant et le bar ferme à 22h

reviews.title: Superbe établissement qui vaut largement ceux du strip, moins tranquilles.
reviews.positives:
Hôtel somptueux avec vue sur le golf, l'aéro train, la sphere, plus le strip en ligne de mire et les montagnes.

La décoration est très tendance et très cosy et le restaurant où a lieu également le petit-déjeuner est très aéré et lumineux.

Le petit-déjeuner est préparé à la demande, servi à table et de super qualité.

Le restaurant est très bien avec une belle carte de vins.
reviews.negatives:
Le petit-déjeuner n'est pas vraiment inclus : il s'agit en fait d'un crédit de 50 $ par chambre : à 4, il faut donc rajouter 50 $ pour se faire plaisir.

Mais cela les vaut largement car les mets sont préparés à la demande avec des produits ultra frais, servis à table avec des couverts dorés et de vraies serviettes blanches en tissu.

Pensez à faire une photo des extras quand vous signez les notes : il y a eu une erreur sur un petit-déjeuner et nous avons dû parlementer lors du ckeck-out pour ne pas être surfacturés. Heureusement, la personne à l'accueil s'est montrée très compréhensive et nous a fait un geste commercial. Merci à elle.

reviews.title: Hôtel parfait pour une escale d’une journée en famille
reviews.positives: Le côté classe de l’hôtel

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ruhige Lage. Nicht im Las Vegas Strip. Geschäftskundenmässig.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Wir haben ein Zimmer mit tollen Aussicht Richtung Strip gehabt, mit Sicht auf ein Golfplatz was auffällig sehr gepflegt und grün war. Die Klimaanlage ist leise, die Fenster können gut verdunkelt werden. Wir haben das Frühstück mit 50USD Pro Übernachtung für 2Personen inkl. gehabt, dafür bekommt man ein üppiges Frühstück. (Amerikanisch mit wahlweise ... Bratkartoffeln Speck ... Kaffe... Orangensaft ), extra auf Wunsch zB. VollkornTost 2 Scheiben für 4USD.

reviews.title: Übernachtung Top, Service könnte etwas besser sein!
reviews.positives: Das Personal war sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. Das Frühstück war sehr gut und die Zimmer waren wirklich sehr schön und groß. Es gab eine sehr gute Bar bzw. Restaurant im Hotel.
reviews.negatives: Ich hatte 2 Tage auf meinen Koffer gewartet und leider hat mich keiner angerufen, als er da war. Ich musste Nachfragen gehen, da ich per Mail die Benachrichtigung erhalten habe. Das Zimmermädchen hat teilweise nach 12 Uhr die Zimmer nicht mehr gereinigt! Das fand ich sehr schade!

reviews.title: Ein schönes, ruhiges Hotel
reviews.positives: Ein schönes, ruhiges Hotel
reviews.negatives: Wlan gegen Gebühr

reviews.title: Pulizia pessima, servizio inefficiente.
reviews.negatives: la stanza era molto sporca. C'erano capelli ovunque: sul pavimento, nella doccia, sul letto e sui mobili. Abbiamo fatto notare questa cosa alla reception che ci ha detto che avrebbero pulito. Dopo un'ora abbiamo chiesto di nuovo l'intervento di pulizia ma ci hanno riferito che era stato effettuato mentre eravamo nella hall. Ciò ovviamente non è avvenuto, poichè al nostro rientro in stanza abbiamo trovato i capelli ancora al loro posto. Abbiamo chiesto un cambio stanza; inizialmente ci hanno detto che non c'era disponibilità, poi dopo molta insistenza ci hanno detto che potevamo spostarci in un altra stanza. Peccato però che c'era solo un letto e noi avevamo prenotato per 3 persone con due letti matrimoniali (come nella stanza precedentemente assegnata, d'altronde). Siamo quindi scesi NUOVAMENTE nella hall per segnalarlo e ci hanno assegnati nuovamente alla stanza di prima con la promessa che avrebbero pulito entro un'ora. Dopo 3 (tre) ore di discussioni con lo staff, siamo andati via per un impegno con forte ritardo a causa di questi disagi. Al nostro rientro, ovviamente, la stanza era ancora sporca. SCONSIGLIATO.

reviews.title: Bella struttura, ma stanza rumorosa
reviews.positives: Bella struttura, in alcune parti da ristrutturare. Buona posizione vicino alla stazione del monorail.
reviews.negatives:
Pessima posizione della camera: si affacciava davanti al motore dei condizionatori dell'Hotel, 
molto rumorosi per tutta la notte. Assurdi i 30 US$ di supplemento obbligatorio servizi extra per notte, 
che include whisky per due persone ( con una temperatura esterna a Las Vegas di 33 C anche alle 23  !)

reviews.title: Buon soggiorno
reviews.positives: Tutto molto piacevole
reviews.negatives: La colazione lenta e poca scelta nelle bevande

reviews.title: Enorm slechte compensatie van een dubbele boeking!
reviews.positives: Ze hadden ons dubbel geboekt dus geen ruimte meer voor ons. We kregen op hun kosten een kamer in het OYO hotel. Zou van hetzelfde kaliber zijn. Nou niet dus, vies hotel, slechte accommodatie en op een veel slechtere locatie namelijk bij het vliegveld. Slechte service van Renaissance hotel!
reviews.negatives: Ik zou niet weten hoe de accommodatie is in het Renaissance aangezien we gedumpt zijn in een ander waardeloos hotel

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Hoe slecht onderhoud wordt gepleegd

reviews.title: Ideaal rustig gelegen hotel voor verblijf met bezoek aan de Sphere.
reviews.positives:
De locatie, de grootte van de kamer en badkamer en de moderne inrichting. 
Dichtbij de Sphere (ongeveer 20 minuten lopen) en achter de drukke Strip. Vanuit onze kamer uitzicht op de Sphere, ideaal voor bezoek concert of als je wat rust zoekt en een hotel zonder casino.
Erg vriendelijke manager Alex die goede adviezen geeft. 
Monorail station is vlakbij. Hotel heeft een eigen parkeergarage.
reviews.negatives: Ontbijtmogelijkheden. Er was een beperkte keuze in een restaurant in het hotel of via Starbucks in het hotel (tegen hoge prijzen)  Een ontbijtbuffet had het compleet gemaakt.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: super vriendelijk personeel, zeer mooi kamers, vlakbij monorail en toch uit de drukte van de strip !

reviews.title: great place if visiting LVCC
reviews.positives:
LVCCの特にCentralやNorthに行くならさくっと行けます。
展示会に手ぶらで行って、必要に応じてホテルの部屋に戻ることができます。
スタッフは親切です。
朝食も美味しいです。
風呂の水圧も強いので風呂もすぐ溜まります。
reviews.negatives:
洗濯物を出したのですが、１９時までに戻ってくるということだったものの、戻ってこず。
２３時頃自分で受付に取りに行ったら、受付の方が探してきてくれました。
が、ズボンが一本ないことに気が付き、いまだに出てきておりません。見つかったら家まで送ってくれるということですがどうなることやら。洗濯を出す方をお気をつけください。

お湯を沸かすポットはなく、コーヒーメーカーがあります。お湯が欲しい方はコーヒーメーカーで頑張ってお湯を作る必要があります。スプーンもないので、部屋でインスタント食品を食べたい人はお気を付けください。私はマドラー２本を箸のように使って食べました。

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: L'esmorzar, amabilitat de tots els treballadors

reviews.title: Not good staff
reviews.positives: Near
reviews.negatives: Charge 180.27$ but not reason. Not check email. Not check booking. Terrible with.

reviews.title: Just a place to sleep. Won’t stay there again
reviews.positives: Location to the convention center
reviews.negatives: No amenities

reviews.title: Glad to be moving on
reviews.positives:
The location was great. Off the strip and away from the bright lights of the strip.
Ideal for the Sphere which is located 10 minutes in a cab and this was the main reason for our visit
reviews.negatives:
Not fully ADA. One automatic door was locked by 8/9pm and I was in a wheelchair. The main entrance has no door man and valet guys are not always about to help with the large metal frame glazed doors.
Manager on duty during our stay was nice after airing our concerns. However some staff could probably do with some training because if there was a problem raised they seemed very dismissive of it.

Booked the Renaissance having stayed with them previously and had an amazing stay. Vegas Renaissance however was a huge disappointment

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.positives: Breakfast was ok, especially the fresh fruit bowl
reviews.negatives: Dated hotel, dirty, no ameneties, poor and dirty bar area

reviews.title: I am not happy. Price vs Quality no Match.
reviews.negatives: Price vs Quality

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Hotel itself is good. Services/amenities not so much.
reviews.negatives: I could not connect to the WiFi on my laptop which set me back a few hours of work. Guest services couldn’t help either. Just get rid of the sign in browser window!!! Also, ordering room service was a pain, I called twice to get a menu sent up, and when they delivered the food, there were no utensils so I called again. But no utensils got delivered. I didn’t bother to call again and just ate it with the coffee stir sticks.

reviews.title: Great kocation for Sphere and access to the Strip via monorail but hotel is primative.
reviews.positives: Jaded property with poor room furnishings. Close to Sphere so that is a bonus. Close to monorail station is another bonus
reviews.negatives:
Snakeoil and smoke and mirrors approach. Given inferior room to hat was booked we arrived. Probably would have been left there if i did not raise an objection. Had to pay for first days breakfast and never refunded.
Have to go early to Club Lounge to get the best of the breakfast offerings.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Nice quiet hotel away from The Strip, clean, good facilities, good pool area. Within walking distance of where we needed to be.
reviews.negatives:
Bar 55 has an extremely rude waiter with a bad attitude (dark hair & beard) who very begrudgingly served us after a 30 minute wait on the evening of 14th November (other guests arriving after us were served during this time) Had it not been for the fact that we had just arrived, were tired and didn't know where else there was nearby to eat we would have left. He left an appalling first impression which tainted the rest of our stay. All other staff there were professional, helpful and pleasant.
No buffet breakfast.
We were on the 7th floor and had to run the water for 10 minutes before we had any hot water.

reviews.title: Not recommended
reviews.positives: the staff tried to charge us twice for breakfast, the barmaid was reluctant to provide information
reviews.negatives: in the information about the room in the order the hotel did not indicate that breakfast will be $50 for two people

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Great location, 3mins walk to convention center.
reviews.negatives: poor sound insulation.

reviews.title: Walking distance from convention center, overall nice place.
reviews.positives: Breakfast was nice, price was not for sure since it is not buffet. Hopefully they change it to small buffet system since it took some time to wait for servers every morning.
reviews.negatives: Bed was quite old, hope they place a soap with better scent.

reviews.title: Only stay here if u need the convention centre. Else it's far from everything
reviews.positives: V v close to convention centre
reviews.negatives: No shops or restaurants around therefor the water and  snacks are so overpriced at the hotel. Food is under average. To go anywhere to eat is an Uber ride away.

reviews.title: Convenient
reviews.positives: The rooms are spacious and the beds are comfortable
reviews.negatives: The rooms are very basic, breakfast is OK, but not great. Its a 45min walk to the strip

reviews.title: Comfortable. Overpriced. Worth to stay for a couple of days.
reviews.positives:
Delicious breakfast.
Clean, comfortable room.
Facilities.
reviews.negatives:
Lots of hidden fees: parking, city tax.
The breakfast voucher does not cover a breakfast: you still need to pay $15-$20, and that is for a very basic breakfast.

reviews.title: The hotel was great. Everything about it was really good... except it was too expensive for the room
reviews.positives: The hotel was great. Everything about it was really good... except it was too expensive for the room.
reviews.negatives: The price

reviews.title: Pleasant and peaceful
reviews.positives: Everything in the hotel and room was clean and modern. Felt comfortable sleeping there. The staff were friendly and location was good. It requires an Uber to get to the strip but we highly appreciated the quietness and simplicity of the hotel instead of having to drag our children through casinos to get to our hotel room such as the case with the hotels on the strip.
reviews.negatives: I did not like their "breakfast included" concept too much, where you receive a credit of 50 dollars per family (in our case 4) to spend on breakfast. Decent menu items naturally starting at 12/13 dollars before tax. I prefer to either just have breakfast included or not.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
the bed was very comfortable.
the parking was spacious.
the staff were kind.
reviews.negatives:
the a/c in the room was too weak for the hot vegas days.

the hallways of the hotel (at least at the 5th floor) were not cleaned for days. the same trash and used wineglasses everyday..

the breakfast deal with the in-house "envy" restaurant is uncomfortable and costly. the breakfast itself was mediocre, slow service and not worth the cost.

reviews.title: Hotel must have direct credit option if for any reason card decline, which generally happen in USA of cards are issued i
reviews.positives: Location was good, but not value for money.
reviews.negatives:
I had a situation in your hotel. 
It was booked subjected to payment at the property. 
At the property my card was declining, all the time it was saying wrong PIN where as I was putting the write PIN number. Initially I tab, where PIN number was not required 
It said Wrong PIN number. May be some issue either with machine or Card. 
Hotel was not excepting cash either. 
Lastly I asked them to send me the link for direct credit. There Link was not working either and there was no support from the staff. 
They send me link 3-4 time but it was not working. 
Pls advise me what shall the visitor suppose to do 
If hotel will not accept cash and even your payment Link won’t work.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very nice hotel.
reviews.negatives: Long walk to the strip. Expensive breakfast.

reviews.title: Very good hotel
reviews.positives: Good location, really close to the Sphere and Wynn.
reviews.negatives: No options for hot water for the tee

reviews.title: Comfortable, not too expensive for being a place in Las Vegas and it was very close to Vegas Blvd
reviews.positives: It is one of the nicest places I've ever been
reviews.negatives: It was supposed to have the breakfast included in my stay (free charge) but they just consider $50 per person per day... I think this is more an issue from Booking, it's not the first time this has happened to me and seems to be lack of communication between Booking and the administration of the places

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Good location for exhibitions visit, good condition of the room, lovely servicer
reviews.negatives: The queen bed a little small for 2 people

reviews.title: Excellent location, cordial and welcoming staff. Convenient location for city tour and airport
reviews.positives:
We spent one night only in the room.
The coffee machine was not working in the room and the reception desk gave us a voucher for collecting drinks in Starbucks.
Very friendly and helpful staff at the reception 
Welcome drink and dessert was welcome
reviews.negatives:
Our booking did not mention that there was no breakfast included. We did realise this until we checked in.
Would have been good to have this when booking on line

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The beds were so comfortable
reviews.negatives: It is a bit far away from the center

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I liked that it was a calmer environment to most hotels, it was a good point to rest after a long convention day. It was clean, and the staff were lovely.
reviews.negatives: Wish there were more breakfast/lunch options, since other places nearby are difficult to get to.

reviews.title: Great hotel with great staff in great location
reviews.positives: Very nice hotel with great facilities and staff. Close to monorail for access to Las Vegas strip

reviews.title: CAOTICA
reviews.positives: Localizaçao
reviews.negatives: Chegamos e nao achavam a nossa reserva. Ai nos deram um quarto de PCD quenao tinha pia, o chuveiro estava quebado e as camas nao eram queens..pessimos todos e a gerente Haley foi antipatica e falou que o booking que errou o colocar meu sobrenome como CGirao e nao somente girao - por favor nao recomedem mais esse hotel. Estou bem decepcionada com vcs...shame on yoy

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Cama confortável, quartos limpos
reviews.negatives:
Na reserva constava com café da manhã incluído.   Porém.   Eles deram um voucher de 50$ pelo quarto para 3 pessoas.   Sendo que o café no restaurante ficava em torno de 35$ por pessoa.   Ou seja.   Em 3 = 100$.   Paguei 50$ todos os dias a mais.   

Na minha opinião.   A informação não está clara

reviews.title: Estadia perfeita
reviews.positives: Banheiro maravilhoso, vista para a bola.
